narratives.narrative_name: CC: Criticism of institutions and authorities

narratives.narrative_name: CC: Hidden plots by secret schemes of powerful groups

narratives.evidence_quote: the “Committee to Unleash Prosperity [CUP], in a survey that sought to measure the beliefs of ‘elites,’ stated the findings reveal climate change ‘is clearly an obsession of the very rich and highly educated.’”
